findings.summary: src/doctor.ts cited scenarios/probes/mcp-disconnect.md, which existed only on the §0 branch — merging §2 first would have put a dangling citation on main and inverted the ratified §0-gates-§2 sequence. Resolved by merging the §0 PR (#227, de37f09a) first and rebasing this branch onto it; the citation now resolves

THE ANTI-OVERCLAIM GUARD DID NOT GUARD. The reviewer grew the line to 'your brain is writable and capture is reaching disk' and the suite stayed 7/7 GREEN — gotcha 6ad98196b5a2 reproduced inside the PR that cites it, with the test defending the overclaim. The negatives were four phrasings I had thought of. Replaced with a shape invariant: any clause raising capture/kb_*/MCP must carry a negation. Verified the reviewer's mutation AND a fifth wording I never enumerated both go red

a FIXED probe path made concurrent doctors read each other's bytes and report 'read back different bytes' — a false alarm of silent disk corruption — with report.ok=false exiting 1. Reproduced by the reviewer at 4x200; path is now pid+random; re-verified at 4 processes x 300 runs with 0 false alarms and 0 leftover files

the doctor L4 re-pin obligation was undischarged: this adds a prominent line to the output scenarios/doctor-staleness.mjs feeds an agent, and gotcha 7bd9302b351e is an agent misreading an ADJACENT doctor line. Re-pinned rather than argued inert — DEMONSTRATED wired 3/3, contrast leaks 0/3, no trial misread the new line

the check is renamed 'write-health (filesystem)' so the scope survives skimming and truncation — the NAME is what gets quoted while the caveat trails ~200 chars behind; a test pins the scope in the name

§0's timeout consequence is now named in-code rather than silently dropped: these are synchronous fs calls and a wedged NFS/FUSE mount blocks doctor; the bounded-round-trip requirement targeted an MCP-probing design this deliberately is not
comment referenced test/doctor-write-health.ts; the file is .test.ts

the read-back is defensive but UNGUARDED — the reviewer independently confirmed removing it leaves the suite green. It guards a real mode (full disk, an overlay that swallows writes) and stays untestable without ADR-0044's storage seam. Disclosed rather than dropped or claimed as covered

the probe file pattern was not gitignored, so a doctor killed between write and unlink left an untracked file in a repo that commits .vfkb/. Fixed here AND in src/init.ts's generated stanza, so new consumers get it too (the #219 lesson: fixing copies without fixing what emits them is a sweep you run again)
